content_fingerprint: openai launches self serve ads manager for chatgpt in beta openai has opened a beta self serve ads manager for chatgpt introducing cpc bidding and new measurement tools as it moves to scale its advertising business beyond early partner pilots openai has launched a beta version of a self serve ads manager platform giving advertisers direct access to buy ad placements across chatgpt the system includes cost per click bidding and enhanced measurement tools designed to help advertisers evaluate campaign performance the rollout marks a shift from openai s earlier reliance on a limited roster of ad
